theme: 一位钟表师的表带抽屉，为什么一格格皮带和弹簧棒比首饰更容易让人上头

items.title: 拉开的表带抽屉第一层
items.description: 抽屉一拉开，那种皮革、秩序和工具共同形成的职业幻想就已经很完整。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, first drawer of a watchmaker's strap cabinet pulled open, neatly sorted leather watch straps in compartments, cool workbench lighting, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_冷白工作灯下的弹簧棒小格.png
items.title: 冷白工作灯下的弹簧棒小格
items.description: 弹簧棒被分门别类地放好时，时间这件事会突然变得非常可以被触摸。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tiny compartments of spring bars under a cool white work lamp on a watchmaker's bench, precise metallic detail, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_放大镜旁边摊开的棕色表带.png
items.title: 放大镜旁边摊开的棕色表带
items.description: 一条摊开的棕色表带，常常比整只表更能说明佩戴者想过怎样的生活。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, brown leather watch strap laid flat beside a loupe on a repair mat, tactile grain detail, professional tabletop realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_镊子夹起细小表耳针的一瞬.png
items.title: 镊子夹起细小表耳针的一瞬
items.description: 这种几乎要屏住呼吸的细小动作，会让职业的迷人程度瞬间超过珠宝陈列。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tweezers lifting a tiny watch pin at a repair bench, focused macro craftsmanship, realistic hands and tools, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_不同皮纹并排试色的工作垫.png
items.title: 不同皮纹并排试色的工作垫
items.description: 当不同皮纹被并排摆开，表带就像比首饰更私人的品味试衣间。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, multiple leather strap textures arranged side by side on a work mat for color comparison, rich material contrast, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_抽屉角落压着的旧维修便签和表带头.png
items.title: 抽屉角落压着的旧维修便签和表带头
items.description: 旧便签和表带头留在角落里，会让这套秩序显得更像真正被反复使用的职业现场。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, worn strap ends and a blank old service note tucked in the corner of a watchmaker drawer, lived-in workshop realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_深色鳄鱼纹表带挨着素面小牛皮.png
items.title: 深色鳄鱼纹表带挨着素面小牛皮
items.description: 夸张和克制被并排放进同一个抽屉时，人的口味也会突然变得可见。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, dark crocodile-pattern strap beside plain calfskin straps inside a drawer organizer, tactile luxury comparison, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_手腕试搭前摆开的两三种表带.png
items.title: 手腕试搭前摆开的两三种表带
items.description: 试搭前摊开的两三种表带，比首饰试戴更像一场关于身份的轻微犹豫。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, two or three watch straps laid out before wrist fitting on a workshop table, understated style decision moment, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_维修垫边缘的表扣和小螺丝.png
items.title: 维修垫边缘的表扣和小螺丝
items.description: 表扣和小螺丝散在维修垫边缘时，时间的质感会变得比佩戴结果更迷人。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, watch buckle and tiny screws scattered along the edge of a repair mat, precise metal details under workshop light, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_傍晚收工前关上一半的抽屉.png
items.title: 傍晚收工前关上一半的抽屉
items.description: 快收工时半关上的抽屉，会让人很想知道这份安静手艺到底还能留住多久。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, half-closed watch strap drawer at dusk in a quiet workshop, soft closing gesture, moody end-of-day craftsmanship, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_客户挑选时桌上留下的空格.png
items.title: 客户挑选时桌上留下的空格
items.description: 被拿走几条表带后的空格，才最像“上头”这件事真实发生过的证据。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, empty compartments left in a strap drawer after customer selection, subtle absence telling the story, clean realistic workshop scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_最后归位的一根深酒红表带.png
items.title: 最后归位的一根深酒红表带
items.description: 最后一根深酒红表带被放回去时，整个抽屉像终于把人的时间观也整理好了。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a deep burgundy leather watch strap being placed back into its compartment, careful hand movement, rich color and orderly composition, no logos, no readable text.
